tool_purpose: HybridNets is an end2end perception network for multi-tasks. Our work focused on traffic object detection, drivable area segmentation and lane detection. HybridNets can run real-time on embedded systems, and obtains SOTA Object Detection, Lane Detection on BDD100K Dataset. Framework: PyTorch. Functionality: Traffic Object Detection, Drivable Area Segmentation, Lane Detection. API call: torch.hub.load(repo_or_dir='datvuthanh/hybridnets', model='hybridnets', pretrained=True).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
